message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-i2j8 resample parity, start pavu cross-format fuzz

Flushes the current beads state after the latest in-flight work:

- frankenpandas-i2j8 "fp-conformance: live pandas oracle for
  DataFrameGroupBy.resample sum|mean": in_progress -> closed.
  close_reason: "shipped: 2 fp-frame tests
  (groupby_resample_sum_int64_input_widens_to_float64,
  groupby_resample_mean_skips_nulls_per_bucket) complementary to
  khv6. Sum/mean tests both at 2/2 pass. Clippy clean." Locks
  parity for DataFrameGroupBy.resample('M').sum() and .mean()
  across interleaved groups and multi-bucket monthly data,
  including the int64->float64 widening contract on sum and the
  per-bucket null-skip contract on mean.

- frankenpandas-pavu "[HIGH] fuzz: cross-format round-trip parity
  fuzz target (catch IO+Equality drift)": open -> in_progress.
  Tracks the new fuzz_format_cross_round_trip target that compares
  parquet / feather / ipc_stream / excel / json / csv round-trips
  against each other via semantic_eq -- motivated by recent IO
  drift bugs (br-989b excel index leak, br-mxho fuzz excel leak,
  calamine 0.34.0 bump) where a per-format round-trip passed in
  isolation but two formats disagreed on the logical frame.

All other frankenpandas issues remain at their existing status/
priority. Pure `br sync --flush-only` output -- no hand-editing of
the JSONL.
